summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of PHASE 3.5.1 Alpha Engine. All 10 alpha factors implemented and working correctly. 100% API test success rate.
passed_tests: Health check endpoint - returns status healthy and version phase_3.5.1
Registry endpoint - returns 10 registered alphas with correct IDs and metadata
Stats endpoint - returns engine stats with correct alpha_ids list
Signals computation - POST /api/alpha-engine/signals with mock data generation
Alpha summary - GET /api/alpha-engine/summary with all 10 alpha values
Individual alpha details - All 10 alpha factors accessible via GET /api/alpha-engine/alpha/{alpha_id}
Batch processing - POST /api/alpha-engine/batch for multiple symbols
Alpha history tracking - GET /api/alpha-engine/history endpoint functional

All 10 alpha factors tested individually: trend_strength, trend_acceleration, trend_exhaustion, breakout_pressure, volatility_compression, volatility_expansion, reversal_pressure, volume_confirmation, volume_anomaly, liquidity_sweep
Alpha results correctly contain direction (LONG/SHORT/NEUTRAL), strength (0-1), confidence (0-1)
Mock market data generation working for testing without real data
API responses properly structured with required fields
MongoDB integration working via repository layer
Alpha scoring engine aggregating results correctly
